title: Canonicalize trickle.rs on u64 version from main
description: Adopt the u64, bias-free, Stopped-aware implementation from /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN/rust/lichen-rpl/src/trickle.rs as single source. It matches Python half-calc (interval+1)/2, RFC >Imin reset, comprehensive overflow tests. Fixes bias bug in worker19 version.
close_reason: Canonical u64 bias-free Stopped-aware trickle.rs adopted from main; matches Python/RFC/tests; bias bug fixed. Verified identical to canonical.
